mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in PAYEMS signals continuing labor-income growth and resilient household demand, causing higher expected corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 148230 thousand for 2018-03
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS 3-month momentum has Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any rolling 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in FEDFUNDS tightens discount rates and reduces the present value of future equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after the tightening threshold is crossed.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 1.51 percent for 2018-03
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS combined with contained CPIAUCSL inflation signals real consumption growth without margin-eroding price pressure, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth > 0 and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth < 3%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 492008 million for 2018-02
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal has no higher 20-day hit rate than RSAFS alone, or if its interaction coefficient is nonpositive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A negative break in INDPRO indicates weakening manufacturing output and declining operating leverage, causing lower expected earnings and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after INDPRO downside breaks are positive in more than 55% of triggered cases or have nonnegative average excess return.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST leads slower construction activity, weaker durable-goods demand, and reduced cyclical earnings expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1236 thousand units for 2018-02
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside breaks do not precede lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than baseline in at least 70% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Low UNRATE combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL raises the probability of further FEDFUNDS tightening, compressing equity valuation multiples and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 4.1 percent for 2018-03
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-unemployment high-inflation state is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS trend reduces short-rate competition with equities and lowers discount rates, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as valuations reprice quickly.
failure_condition: Reject if falling 3-month FEDFUNDS changes fail to produce a positive 5-day return spread versus rising FEDFUNDS changes in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: GDPC1 acceleration confirmed by rising INDPRO signals broad real activity momentum, raising expected aggregate earnings and causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth crosses above 2% and INDPRO 3-month growth > 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest vintage available at decision time was 2017-10
failure_condition: Reject if the combined GDPC1 and INDPRO expansion signal has lower 60-day predictive accuracy than either single proxy in more than half of rolling windows.
